name: Server Actions
rules: Every server action file starts with 'use server'
Only async functions may be exported — never export const
First line of every action: requireChef() or requireClient() or requireAuth()
tenant_id comes from session (user.tenantId!), never from request body
Wrap non-blocking side effects (notifications, emails, logs) in try/catch — never throw
Move constants to a separate file (e.g., lib/x/constants.ts), not in 'use server' files
